title: Unit test: happy path
implementation_summary: Added control-plane Hermes Validation unit happy-path test policy for RP00.P02.M03.S19.
The S19 policy, module descriptor, validator, synthetic fixture, contract definition, and README bind a golden unit test over the S01-S18 Hermes validation chain.

The dedicated service test consumes the S18 retry behavior result and proves the happy path reaches retry_behavior_metadata_only while carrying permission, audit, tenant, Matter, TEN trace, and acceptance-gate references.

The S19 fixture records a synthetic deterministic tenant-scoped golden proof with no real client data, no real matter data, no credentials, no secrets, no product-state writes, and exact parity with the S18 retry behavior fixture result.

The S19 boundary remains test-only: it does not execute service logic, create runtime routes, run Hermes validation, create Hermes evidence, enqueue retry, execute retry, write retry queue or attempt records, persist retry schedules, start retry timers, dispatch retry workers, execute rollback, execute compensation, notify customers, write incident traces, append observability events, write audit events, write databases, write storage, or persist product state.
RP00.P02.M03 remains open and S19 hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S20 Unit test: denied path.
